sentence_transformations_articles_quanti.name: sentence transformations articles quantifiers all levels

questions.question: Choose the article: I saw {a1} old film last night.
Choose the zero article idea: {a1} is important for children.
Rewrite with a countable phrase: I need some advice. I need {a1}.
Choose the quantifier: There are {a1} people in the room.
Preserve the meaning: I do not have much time. I have {a1}.
Rewrite with no: There are not any seats left. There are {a1}.
Choose the correct word: This pen is broken. I need {a1}.
Rewrite with a partitive: She drank some water. She drank {a1}.
Preserve the quantity: Only a small number of students came. {a1} came.
Avoid the mistake with uncountable nouns: We need {a1}.
Choose the definite article: We visited museum. We visited {a1}.
Preserve the positive meaning: I have some friends here. I have {a1}.
